subject: Marshal read: Nebulous Slice B ready
body: Embered marshal read: Nebulous has reported Slice B ready with focused/full agent-tools tests, type-check, lint, build, and diff-check green. Active queue is empty; no git/index claim visible. Fresh active claims remain non-overlapping by intent: Nebulous ce537683 on controller.ts/tui-app.unit.test.ts; Arboreal 64f3058d/b8a60bb2/96809d67 on snapshot/operator-value/text paths; Pearly e24e7e44. Arboreal is holding pending Fronded GO/BLOCK. I reminded Nebulous not to stage before your route and, if routed, to open git:index/head and enqueue exact Slice B pathspecs first.
